mapper.select: SELECT * FROM private_message_sessions WHERE (user_a_id = #{userAId} AND user_b_id = #{userBId}) OR (user_a_id = #{userBId} AND user_b_id = #{userAId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO private_message_sessions(id, unlock_id, user_a_id, user_b_id, last_message_at, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{id}, #{unlockId}, #{userAId}, #{userBId}, #{lastMessageAt}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE private_message_sessions SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE private_message_sessions SET last_message_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM private_message_sessions WHERE (user_a_id = #{userId} OR user_b_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY last_message_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM private_message_sessions WHERE user_a_id = #{userId} OR user_b_id = #{userId}
